case_title: COLABIANCHI, SEBASTIAN vs. BANTA, GARY et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE TO PAY OR QUIT AND/OR NOTICE TO VACATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLABIANCHI, SEBASTIAN
